body:
# Magic Items — D&D 3.5 SRD Reference

Source: d20srd.org/srd/magicItems/

---

## CL Requirements for Item Creation

| Item Type | Feat Required | Min CL |
|---|---|---|
| Scroll | Scribe Scroll | 1 |
| Potion | Brew Potion | 3 |
| Wand | Craft Wand | 5 |
| Wondrous Item | Craft Wondrous Item | 3 |
| Arms & Armor | Craft Magic Arms and Armor | 5 |
| Rod | Craft Rod | 9 |
| Ring | Forge Ring | 12 |
| Staff | Craft Staff | 12 |

---

## Item Creation Rules

**Cost**: Base price ÷ 2 in gp (+ ÷ 25 in XP for most items)
**Time**: Base price ÷ 1,000 gp /day (min 1 day)
**Missing spell**: +5 to crafting DC per missing spell; must make Spellcraft check

**CL of Item**: Can create at higher CL than min (more expensive); CL sets save DCs and duration.

---

## Pricing Formula (Guideline)

| Item Type | Price Formula |
|---|---|
| Spell effect (1 use) | SL × CL × 25 gp (potions/scrolls) |
| Command word (1/day) | SL × CL × 1,800 gp |
| Command word (unlimited) | SL × CL × 2,000 gp |
| Use-activated (constant) | SL × CL × 4,000 gp |
| Single-use (use-activated) | SL × CL × 50 gp |

Modifiers: ×2 if not slot; ÷2 if 3/day or limited charges; ×1.5 for additional similar powers on same item

---

## Armor and Shield Bonuses

| Enhancement bon | min CL | Market Price (Armor) |
|---|---|---|
| +1 | 3rd | +1,000 gp |
| +2 | 6th | +4,000 gp |
| +3 | 9th | +9,000 gp |
| +4 | 12th | +16,000 gp |
| +5 | 15th | +25,000 gp |

**Special Armor Properties** (add to base +X for prerequisites):
- Fortification (light) +1 equivalent: 25% chance negate sneak/crit
- Fortification (moderate) +3 equiv: 75%
- Fortification (heavy) +5 equiv: 100%
- Shadow +1 equiv: +5 Hide checks
- Mithral: Light as one category lighter; max DEX +1; ACP −3
- Adamantine: DR 1/− (light), 2/− (medium), 3/− (heavy)

---

## Weapon Bonuses and Properties

| Enhancement | Min CL | Price bon |
|---|---|---|
| +1 | 5th | +2,000 gp |
| +2 | 8th | +8,000 gp |
| +3 | 11th | +18,000 gp |
| +4 | 14th | +32,000 gp |
| +5 | 17th | +50,000 gp |

**Common Special Abilities:**
| Property | Equiv. bon | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| Flaming | +1 | +1d6 fire on hit |
| Frost | +1 | +1d6 cold |
| Shock | +1 | +1d6 electricity |
| Keen | +1 | Double threat range (stacks multiplicatively: 17–20 → 15–20; 19–20 → 17–20) |
| Holy | +2 | +2d6 vs. evil; evil creatures struck suffer additional damage |
| Unholy | +2 | +2d6 vs. good |
| Vorpal | +5 | On natural 20: decapitate (Fort DC 20 or die) |
| Speed | +3 | Extra attack at highest BAB on full attack |
| Disruption | +2 | Undead: Fort DC 14 or destroyed on hit |

**Max total equivalent bon**: +10 (e.g., +5 keen holy = +5+1+2 = +8 ok; can't exceed +10)

---

## Common Wondrous Items (SRD)

| Item | Price | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| Bag of Holding (I) | 2,500 gp | 250 lb; 30 cu ft |
| Boots of Speed | 12,000 gp | Haste 10 rounds/day |
| Boots of Elvenkind | 2,500 gp | +5 Move Silently |
| Cloak of Elvenkind | 2,500 gp | +5 Hide |
| Cloak of Resistance +1–+5 | 1,000–25,000 gp | +1–+5 all saves |
| Decanter of Endless Water | 9,000 gp | Stream/fountain/geyser of water |
| Eyes of the Eagle | 2,500 gp | +5 Spot |
| Gauntlets of Ogre Power | 4,000 gp | STR 19 (if lower) |
| Gloves of DEX +2/+4/+6 | 4,000/16,000/36,000 gp | +N DEX |
| Goggles of Night | 12,000 gp | Darkvision 60 ft |
| Handy Haversack | 2,000 gp | 120 lb; retrieved as FreeA |
| Headband of Intellect +2–+6 | 4,000–36,000 gp | +N INT |
| Ioun Stones (various) | 4,000–30,000 gp | Orbit head; various effects |
| Pearl of Power (1st–9th) | 1,000–81,000 gp | Regain one expended spell/day |
| Ring of Protection +1–+5 | 2,000–50,000 gp | Deflection bon to AC |
| Robe of the Archmagi | 75,000 gp | +5 AC; +4 saves; SR 18; +2 CL |
| Rope of Climbing | 3,000 gp | 60 ft; 3,000 lb; animate |
| Scarab of Protection | 38,000 gp | SR 20; absorb 12 death spells |

---

## Scrolls

**Activation**: Read Magic to identify; Use Magic Device (DC 20+SL) to use another's scroll
**Failure**: Roll d% < SL percentage → wild surge; CL check to avoid mishap
**Arcane vs Divine**: Arcane casters cannot use divine scrolls without Use Magic Device and vice versa

**Pricing**:
- 0-level: 12.5 gp
- 1st: 25 gp
- 2nd: 150 gp
- 3rd: 375 gp
- 4th: 700 gp
- 5th: 1,125 gp
- 6th: 1,650 gp
- 7th: 2,275 gp
- 8th: 3,000 gp
- 9th: 3,825 gp

---

## Wands

750 charges max (50 charges/wand manufactured). Each charge = one use of the spell.
**Pricing**: SL × CL × 750 gp (for 50 charges)
- Wand of Magic Missile (CL 1): 750 gp
- Wand of Fireball (CL 5): 11,250 gp
- Wand of Lightning Bolt (CL 5): 11,250 gp
- Wand of Cure Light Wounds (CL 1): 750 gp

**Use Magic Device** to activate wands without the class/spell list.

---

## Intelligent Items

Magic items with Int score: treat as NPCs. Ego score determines who controls conflicts.
**Ego** = item's power rating. If Ego > (char_lvl + Will save + misc), item "wins" control checks.
Intelligent items can communicate: empathy, speech, telepathy (progressively more expensive).
